# kCMFormatDescriptionExtension_ConvertedFromExternalSphericalTags | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Media ](/documentation/coremedia)

- [ kCMFormatDescriptionExtension_ConvertedFromExternalSphericalTags ](/documentation/coremedia/kcmformatdescriptionextension_convertedfromexternalsphericaltags)

-  kCMFormatDescriptionExtension_ConvertedFromExternalSphericalTags 

Global Variable# kCMFormatDescriptionExtension_ConvertedFromExternalSphericalTags

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
let kCMFormatDescriptionExtension_ConvertedFromExternalSphericalTags: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coremedia/kcmformatdescriptionextension_convertedfromexternalsphericaltags#discussion)

Indicates that the image description contains projected media data converted from an external format

This format description extension is included if boxes containing external stereoscopic or spherical projection information were parsed.
